messages.errors.AI_OFFLINE: AI is not available. Check that models are installed.
messages.errors.AI_STARTING: AI is starting up. Please wait a moment.
messages.errors.BAD_REQUEST: The request could not be processed.
messages.errors.BUDGET_EXHAUSTED: The agent ran out of token budget for this session.
messages.errors.CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Confirmation is required before this action can proceed.
messages.errors.CONTEXT_TOO_LARGE: The content is too large. Try selecting fewer files.
messages.errors.CURSOR_INVALID: The search cursor expired. Please search again.
messages.errors.DOWNLOADS_DISABLED: Downloads are disabled by administrator policy.
messages.errors.DOWNLOAD_FAILED: AI model download failed. Check your network connection and try again.
messages.errors.EMPTY_RESPONSE: The agent returned an empty response. Try rephrasing your request.
messages.errors.FETCH_FAILED: Network request failed. Check your connection and try again.
messages.errors.HANDOFF_CYCLE_DETECTED: The agents entered a handoff loop and were stopped automatically.
messages.errors.INDEX_BACKPRESSURE: The search index is overloaded. Please wait and try again.
messages.errors.INDEX_CORRUPT: The search index is corrupted. Rebuild it from the Health view.
messages.errors.INDEX_DISK_FULL: The disk is full. Free up space and try again.
messages.errors.INDEX_ERROR: Index error. The search index may be corrupted.
messages.errors.INDEX_LOCKED: The search index is locked by another process. Close other instances and try again.
messages.errors.INDEX_SCHEMA_MISMATCH: The search index format is incompatible. A reindex is required.
messages.errors.INDEX_UNAVAILABLE: The search index is not available.
messages.errors.INFERENCE_DETACH_FAILED: Failed to detach AI inference engine.
messages.errors.INFERENCE_RELOAD_FAILED: Failed to reload AI inference engine.
messages.errors.INSTALL_ALREADY_RUNNING: AI installation is already in progress.
messages.errors.INSTALL_IO_ERROR: Failed to create AI directories. Check disk space and permissions.
messages.errors.INSTALL_MOVE_FAILED: Failed to move AI files into place. Check disk space and permissions.
messages.errors.INSTALL_START_FAILED: Failed to start AI installation. Please try again.
messages.errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
messages.errors.INVALID_JSON: The request body is not valid JSON.
messages.errors.INVALID_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
messages.errors.INVALID_STATE: The operation cannot be completed in the current state.
messages.errors.LLM_OVERLOADED: AI is overloaded. Please wait and try again.
messages.errors.LLM_TRANSIENT: AI encountered a temporary error. Please try again.
messages.errors.MACHINE_POLICY_PRESENT: Machine policy is present. User policy changes are blocked.
messages.errors.MANIFEST_INVALID: AI model manifest is invalid or has no assets.
messages.errors.MANIFEST_NOT_CONFIGURED: AI model manifest is not configured.
messages.errors.MANIFEST_UNAVAILABLE: AI model manifest is unavailable. Check your network connection.
messages.errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
messages.errors.NO_CONTENT: The document has no content to process.
messages.errors.NO_TOOLS: No tools are available for the agent.
messages.errors.PACK_ASSET_DUPLICATE_FILE: Duplicate file reference in pack assets.
messages.errors.PACK_ASSET_INVALID: Invalid asset entry in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_ASSET_MISSING_REQUIRED: Required asset roles are missing from the pack.
messages.errors.PACK_ASSET_ROLE_UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported asset role in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_ASSET_UNKNOWN_FILE: Asset references an unknown file in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_FILE_DUPLICATE_ID: Duplicate file ID in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_FILE_DUPLICATE_PATH: Duplicate file path in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_FILE_INVALID: Invalid file entry in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_FILE_SHA_INVALID: Invalid file checksum in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_IMPORT_RUNNING: A pack import is already in progress.
messages.errors.PACK_IO_ERROR: Failed to read AI pack files.
messages.errors.PACK_MANIFEST_MISSING: AI pack is missing its manifest file.
messages.errors.PACK_NOT_ALLOWLISTED_BY_MACHINE_P: This AI pack is blocked by administrator policy.
messages.errors.PACK_NOT_ALLOWLISTED_BY_USER_POLI: This AI pack is not in your allowed list. Add it to your user policy to continue.
messages.errors.PACK_NOT_FOUND: AI pack file was not found.
messages.errors.PACK_RUNTIME_EXE_INVALID: Runtime pack has an unexpected executable filename.
messages.errors.PACK_RUNTIME_FILE_UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported file type in runtime pack.
messages.errors.PACK_RUNTIME_VARIANT_INVALID: Invalid runtime variant in pack manifest.
messages.errors.PACK_RUNTIME_VARIANT_MISMATCH: Asset variant does not match pack variant.
messages.errors.PACK_ZIP_DUPLICATE_ENTRY: AI pack archive contains duplicate files.
messages.errors.POLICY_DENIED: This action is denied by policy.
messages.errors.POLICY_EXTERNAL_SERVER_DISALLOWED: External server connection is disallowed by policy.
messages.errors.POLICY_GPU_DISABLED: GPU acceleration is disabled by administrator policy.
messages.errors.POLICY_MODEL_NOT_ALLOWLISTED: One or more AI models are not allowed by policy.
messages.errors.POLICY_ONLINE_AI_DISABLED: Online AI is disabled by administrator policy.
messages.errors.RUNTIME_ACTIVATION_RUNNING: AI runtime activation is already in progress.
messages.errors.RUNTIME_MISSING: AI runtime is not installed. Run the AI installer first.
messages.errors.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The search service is not available. Please wait and try again.
messages.errors.SETTINGS_READ_ONLY: Settings are session-only in this mode. Changes won't persist after restart.
messages.errors.SMOKE_TEST_FAILED: AI smoke test failed. The installation may be incomplete.
messages.errors.STREAM_TRUNCATED: The AI response was cut short. Please try again.
messages.errors.TERMS_REQUIRED: You must accept the model terms before downloading.
messages.errors.TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Please try again.
messages.errors.TOOL_CONTRACT: A tool returned an unexpected result.
messages.errors.TOOL_LOOP: The agent entered a repetitive loop and was stopped automatically.
messages.errors.TOOL_TRANSIENT_READ_ONLY: A tool failed temporarily. The agent will retry.
messages.errors.TRUST_DENIED: This action is not permitted from this source.
messages.errors.UNAVAILABLE: The agent is not available. Check that inference is running.
messages.errors.UNKNOWN_TOOL: The agent requested an unknown tool.
messages.errors.USER_POLICY_DIR_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create user policy directory.
messages.errors.USER_POLICY_INVALID_JSON: User policy file contains invalid JSON.
messages.errors.USER_POLICY_MISSING: User policy does not exist. Create it first.
messages.errors.USER_POLICY_PATH_INVALID: User policy file path is invalid.
messages.errors.USER_POLICY_PATH_UNAVAILABLE: User policy file path could not be determined.
messages.errors.VERIFY_FAILED: AI model verification failed. The download may be corrupted.
